t_ch: 这是什么？假期结束后的感想小作文？我说灰子，咱们之间还用得着来这套嘛？
t_en: What's this? An essay? "How I spent my summer vacation?" Come on, Gray Mystery. Do things really need to be so formal between us?

t_ch: 店开得再好，玩得再开心，也不会变成口袋里沉甸甸的金币，反而还要被那群小动物呼来喊去的，累得我尾巴上的毛都快掉光了……
t_en: Sure, the restaurant's running smoothly and it's fun, but it's not like I'm filling my pockets with gold. On top of that, I'm getting bossed around by those little critters so much that the fur on my tail has practically all fallen out.

t_ch: 嗐，千言万语，总结成一句话——白忙活！
t_en: Phew... If I had to sum it up in one line I'd say: Whole lotta work for nothing!

t_ch: 即便如此，赛飞儿阁下也没有拒绝店长的邀约呢。
t_en: Even so, Lady Cipher, you didn't turn down the manager's invitation, did you?

t_ch: 我、我糊涂啊！听到要开店就兴冲冲地跑过来，本以为能大赚一笔，谁知道…哎！
t_en: I—I wasn't thinking straight! The moment I heard there was going to be a restaurant, I rushed over all excited, thinking I'd make a fortune... Who knew...

t_ch: 你不是假扮了妖精评审员嘛？
t_en: Weren't you the one who posed as a fairy food critic?

t_ch: 那天，连我也被赛飞儿阁下的诡计骗过，慌忙尝了好多口菜品……
t_en: I have to admit, even I was fooled by your little scheme that day. I ended up tasting so many dishes...

t_ch: 噢！我记得！这不是实在没事情干，闲得慌嘛。
t_en: Oh, that's right! Okay, I was just bored out of my mind with nothing else to do.

t_ch: 妖精村子不和外面连通，小动物也掏不出什么值钱的东西，就算是那位诡计之神亲自到访，都得感慨自己学的专业不对口啊！
t_en: This fairy village is cut off from the outside, and those tiny creatures can't cough up anything worth much. Even the god of trickery would show up and complain that their skills are wasted here!

t_ch: 你不是如愿使唤了阿格莱雅嘛？
t_en: Didn't you get your wish to boss Aglaea around?

t_ch: 哈哈哈！对对！就这个，最好玩了！
t_en: Hahaha! Yes, yes! That was hands down the most fun!

t_ch: 没想到真有一天，那位高高在上的金织大小姐，也能受我使唤，实在太有意思了！
t_en: I never thought the day would come when the lofty Lady Goldweaver would take orders from me. It was just too enjoyable!

t_ch: …还好阿格莱雅大人只当是玩笑，换作在奥赫玛，恐怕得攥紧金线了。
t_en: ...Thankfully, Lady Aglaea treated it as good fun. If we were in Okhema, we'd be clutching the golden threads for dear life.

t_ch: 都是有趣的回忆。
t_en: All fun moments.

t_ch: …这么想来，我还真做了不少有意思的事啊。
t_en: ...Looking back, I guess I really did have my share of interesting moments.

t_ch: 依我看，赛飞儿阁下玩得很开心。
t_en: Seems to me like Lady Cipher had plenty of fun.

t_ch: 那你呢，蜗居公主？在餐馆的经营团队之外，你享受到乐趣了吗？
t_en: And what about you, Princess Homebody? Aside from being part of the restaurant team, did you have fun?

t_ch: 我的话…能品尝到万敌阁下的拿手菜，和那刻夏老师探讨作物的栽培技巧……
t_en: For me... having the chance to savor Lord Mydei's specialties, and exchanging thoughts on crop cultivation with Professor Anaxa...

t_ch: 以及，亲手为{NICKNAME}阁下颁发奖章。
t_en: As well as personally awarding {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} a medal.

t_ch: 点点滴滴，都值得铭记在心。
t_en: All these small moments are treasures to be remembered.

t_ch: 但赛飞儿阁下，有件事…我仍旧想不明白。你明知妖精的钱币与外界并不流通，为何还要执意取走一枚呢？
t_en: There's just one thing that I still can't figure out, Lady Cipher. You know fairy coins hold no value outside the fairy world, so why did you insist on taking one?

t_ch: 真想知道？其实也没那么复杂。
t_en: Really wanna know? It's actually not that complicated.

t_ch: 就是这儿的生活太清闲了，没有使命，也没有忧患，教人好不适应，就像做梦一样。
t_en: Life here is just too peaceful... no duties, no worries. It feels so strange, almost like a dream.

t_ch: 但梦总会结束的。要是不带着点特别的标记，出去以后……
t_en: But dreams always come to an end. And if I leave without a special memento...

t_ch: 我又该怎么分辨，自己是不是还在梦里呢？
t_en: Then how will I know... if I'm still dreaming or not?

t_ch: 不必担心，赛飞儿阁下。我们…会编织出新的美梦的。
t_en: Don't worry, Lady Cipher. We... will weave new dreams together.

t_ch: 若是将密林中的妖精居所比作深海，此番盛宴便是那水面洒落的光亮。
t_en: If the fairies' home hidden in the thick woods is a deep ocean, then this feast is the glimmering light upon its surface.

t_ch: 驱散长久的黑暗，也为沉积在厚重泥沙堆里的鱼儿们带来希望。
t_en: It scatters the darkness that has lingered for so long and brings hope to the fish lying hidden beneath heavy layers of silt.

t_ch: 怎么突然开始吟诗了？
t_en: Hold on... why are you suddenly composing poetry?

t_ch: 呵。不过是一朵浪花的余音罢了，小灰鱼儿无须太过记挂。
t_en: Heh. It's nothing but the echo of a passing wave, Little Gray Fry. No need to think too much about it.

t_ch: 宴会的意义就是请客吃饭。
t_en: A feast is all about treating your guests to good food.

t_ch: 呵。若是能助你尽情享受这片刻沉醉，作如此定性又有何妨呢？
t_en: Ha... If that philosophy helps you indulge in a moment of delight, so be it.

t_ch: 哦？难得见剑旗爵如此有雅兴，看来这次谋划之外的行军，让你颇有感触啊？
t_en: Oh? It's unusual to see such poetic spirit from the Dux Gladiorum. Seems this unplanned venture left quite the impression on you, didn't it?

t_ch: 凯撒言笑了。作为部属，我理应坦诚回答店长的疑问。
t_en: You jest, Imperator, but as a subordinate it's my place to respond truthfully to the manager's question.

t_ch: 贵为掌管宴会的「海洋」半神，剑旗爵的开场白未免过分沉重。
t_en: As the Ocean demigod who presides over feasts, Dux Gladiorum, opening with such weighty words does seem a touch too serious.

t_ch: 依我看，这盛宴倒更像是团纠缠不清的纺纱，我们各执金线的一端，最终交织于此。
t_en: The way I see it, this grand feast is more like a tangled ball of yarn, each of us grasping a golden thread, and all of them converging and intertwining here.

t_ch: 但若继续沉湎过往，就太浪费这丰盛的晚宴了。
t_en: But if we keep clinging to the past, we'll miss the chance to savor this magnificent feast.

t_ch: 至于发问，我在初次结识时便已回答过——凯撒的高位既是荣耀，亦是禁锢；君王若是入席，只会让臣民难得酣畅。
t_en: I gave my answer the moment we first met. The title of Imperator is as much an honor as it is a chain. If a ruler sits among her people, her subjects will never truly relax.

t_ch: 因此，能短暂离开那王座，与诸位爱臣无拘束地畅谈言欢，便是我此行最大的收获。
t_en: So, to leave the throne for a time and talk, laugh, and share warmth with everyone without formality... That alone has made this journey worthwhile.

t_ch: 倒确实许久，没有见凯撒笑得如此开怀了。
t_en: It's true... it has been a long time since I've seen the Imperator smile so genuinely.

t_ch: 要不再笑一个？
t_en: How about one more smile?

t_ch: 呵。剑旗爵，店长的任务就交由你去完成了。
t_en: Heh. Dux Gladiorum, I'll leave the manager's task in your hands.

t_ch: 你也笑一笑吧？
t_en: You should smile more, too, Hysilens.

t_ch: 是。现在…如何呢？
t_en: Alright... How about this?

t_ch: 关于店长的提问，我要说，我…很庆幸。
t_en: To answer the store manager's question... I have to say I feel truly fortunate.

t_ch: 若非此次奇遇，恐怕我再难有机会拾起针线，以一介改衣师的身份与各位攀谈。「浪漫」的神权，总算是适得其所了。
t_en: Were it not for this strange twist of fate, I doubt I would've ever had the chance to pick up the needle and thread again, and chat with you all as a simple dressmaster. The divine authority of Romance has finally been put to fitting use.

t_ch: 是啊。正如金织爵所言，我们途经数不清的年月，各执金线一端，最终交织于此。
t_en: Yes... just as Dux Goldweaver said, we've each traveled through countless years, grasping a golden thread, and in the end, all our threads are intertwining here.

t_ch: 举杯吧。敬店长，与来之不易的重逢——
t_en: Raise your glass. To the manager, and to the rare gift of reunion.

t_ch: 敬妖精餐馆。
t_en: To the fairies' restaurant.

t_ch: 敬凯撒。
t_en: To the Imperator.

t_ch: 敬最盛大的宴会。
t_en: To the greatest feast.

t_ch: 敬店长，与循环往复的洋流——
t_en: To the manager, and to the endless, flowing tides...

t_ch: 敬…相聚的此刻——
t_en: To... this precious moment of reunion...

t_ch: 昔涟…还没回来吗？
t_en: Cyrene... hasn't returned yet?

t_ch: 迷！都准备好啦，宴会可以开始啦！
t_en: Mem! We're all ready. Let the feast begin!

t_ch: 呵呵。那就请妖精餐馆的店长，向整个迷境宣布这一消息吧！
t_en: Heh... well then... the fairy restaurant's manager has something to say.

t_ch: 声音得足够大，要让所有客人都能听见哦。
t_en: Be loud and clear. All the guests need to hear you!

t_ch: 我宣布——宴会正式开始！
t_en: I hereby declare — the feast has officially begun!

t_ch: 少说废话，直接开吃！
t_en: Enough talk. Let's eat!

t_ch: 迷！宴会开始！大家，开吃！
t_en: Mem! The feast has started! Everyone, dig in!

t_ch: 开吃！迷！迷！
t_en: Dig in! Mem! Mem!

s_en: All Fairies of the Membrance Maze
t_ch: 迷！开吃——
t_en: Mem! Let's eat!

t_ch: 怎么了？充满心事的样子。明明是宴会的高潮，却一个人走到安静的角落……
t_en: What's wrong? It's the best part of the feast, and yet here you are, standing alone in a quiet corner...

t_ch: 莫非，是因为快乐的时光临近结束，会让你觉得有些感伤？
t_en: Could it be... the thought of these joyful moments coming to an end has made you a little wistful?

t_ch: 也许我们在想同一件事。
t_en: Perhaps you and I are thinking the same thing.

t_ch: 是呀，所以我们才会在这里相遇。
t_en: That's right. It's why fate brought us together here.

t_ch: 我只是喜欢独处。
t_en: I just like being on my own.

t_ch: 那，可以待在你身边吗？我也喜欢独处，就这样静静的，应该不会打扰你？
t_en: So... would it be alright if I stayed with you? I also like peaceful moments to myself... I won't disturb you.

t_ch: 村长找你有什么事？
t_en: What did the village chief want with you?

t_ch: 代替你去接受了村长的感谢。还记得吗？它视力不好，把我们俩认错啦。
t_en: I went and accepted the chief's thanks on your behalf. Remember? With their poor eyesight, they mistook me for you!

t_ch: 从这里望去，能把整场宴会尽收眼底呢。
t_en: From here, you can take in the entire feast at once.

t_ch: 也许不想加入其中，只是害怕愉快的时光转瞬即逝，不知不觉就会戛然而止。
t_en: Maybe it's not that you don't want to be part of it, but that you're afraid the good times will vanish before you know it, ending all too soon.

t_ch: 像这样躲在一旁，远远地看着，时间反而会慢下来，甚至停下来。
t_en: When you stand quietly at a distance like this and just watch, time seems to slow... Sometimes it feels like it stops altogether.

t_ch: 嘻，我想到了…「木盆里堆满了蔬菜，到处都是笑声。大家围成大大的圈，唱呀跳呀，仿佛这一刻永远不会结束。」
t_en: Hehe... I've just thought of an ending: "Wooden tubs stacked high with fresh vegetables, laughter all around. Everyone held hands in a big circle, singing and dancing, like this moment would never end."

t_ch: 就这样为故事收尾，应该还不错吧？
t_en: Bringing the story to a close like this... I'd say it's not bad, wouldn't you?

t_ch: 故事要结束了吗？
t_en: Is the story coming to an end?

t_ch: 该结束啦。毕竟宴会过后，妖精们就该回去睡觉了。它们可都是早睡早起的好宝宝。
t_en: It's a good time to end it~ After all, once the feast is over, the fairies need to go to bed. They're all such well-behaved little early birds.

t_ch: 真希望它能继续下去。
t_en: I wish it didn't have to end.

t_ch: 不能继续啦，否则，徕啦迷的肚皮要比黎明机器更大了。小妖精不消化可怎么办呀？
t_en: We really can't keep going... or Relimem's belly will outgrow the Dawn Device! What will we do if the little fairies end up with bellyaches?

t_ch: 在漫长的等待过后，与世隔绝的迷境终于迎来了客人。现在，妖精们有比我还高的作物、吃不完的美食、还有人类伙伴们……
t_en: At long last, after ages of waiting, Membrance Maze has guests again. The fairies now have towering crops, more food than they can finish, and human companions...

t_ch: 没有什么比这一幕更值得被铭记，不是吗？更何况，是我们共同见证了它。
t_en: There's nothing more worth remembering than this moment, is there? And best of all... we witnessed it together.

t_ch: 就像飘落在湖面的思绪，荡起阵阵涟漪，回过神来，只留下一张现实的脸庞。
t_en: It's just like a drifting thought landing on a calm lake, stirring up gentle ripples... and when you snap out of your daze, there's only reality, staring back at you.

t_ch: 但我相信，在每一个随涟漪散去的故事里，都有着同样幸福的守候。
t_en: Yet I'm certain that within every story carried away by the ripples, the same joyful anticipation remains.

t_ch: 而在那一成不变的守候中，一定会有奇迹发生……
t_en: And in that constant anticipation, a miracle is sure to happen...

t_ch: 就像最后，我们等来了你呀♪
t_en: Just like how after all that waiting, you finally arrived♪

t_ch: <size=28>信使们还在为甜饼的烹饪方法而争论，悬锋的主厨笑着给出认可。\n无论何时，大家共同制作的菜品才最为美味。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
t_en: <size=28>The messengers were still debating over the cookie recipe while Kremnos' head chef watched with an approving smile.\nAfter all, dishes made together always taste the best.</size>

t_ch: <size=28>凯撒与剑旗爵举杯共饮，畅谈起妖精居所的趣事、过往的行军、记忆中的欢宴。\n还有那始终未竟的征服——{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
t_en: <size=28>The Imperator and Dux Gladiorum raised their glasses together, sharing tales of fairy dwellings, past campaigns, and memorialized feasts.\nAnd that eternal, unfinished conquest—</size>

t_ch: <size=28>赛飞儿兴奋地同「金织」述说着旅途中见闻，珍贵的时光在留影石机中定格。\n无须再去分辨，这里不需要任何谎言。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
t_en: <size=28>Cipher excitedly shares her traveling stories with the "Goldweaver," precious moments frozen in the photostone.\nNo need to tell truth from lies anymore. This place needs no deception.</size>

t_ch: <size=28>贤人朗声讲授农作知识，学生们依旧围在他的身侧，或是深思，或是发出驳论。\n树庭的学堂在此重新开课了。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
t_en: <size=28>The Sage's voice rings out as he lectures on agricultural knowledge, while students gather around him, some deep in thought, others raising counterarguments.\nThe school in the Grove has resumed its classes.</size>

t_ch: 最盛大的宴会正式开场。\n\n妖精们大快朵颐，所有人都沉浸在热烈的氛围中……
t_en: The grandest feast officially begins.\n\nThe fairies feast to their heart's content as everyone is immersed in the festive atmosphere...

t_ch: 宴会仍在继续。你悄悄地离开人群，从远处望着这一切……
t_en: The party continues. You quietly slip away from the crowd, watching everything from afar...

t_ch: 恭喜贵餐馆顺利通过评审，收录进迷其林美食名单中。
t_en: Congratulations. Your restaurant has officially passed the review and is now featured in The Memchelin Gourmet Guide.

t_ch: 尽管菜品种类有些单调，白厄阁下制作的沙拉却意外地相当美味呢。
t_en: While the dish selection may be a bit simple, Lord Phainon's salad turned out surprisingly tasty.

t_ch: 想了解迷其林美食评审…
t_en: I want to know about the Memchelin Food Review...

t_ch: 具体情况，我也不是很清楚。迷境似乎很早便有举办美食评选的传统，获得认可的菜品和店铺会收录进那本指南中。
t_en: Well. I'm not totally sure, either. From what I hear, the Maze has held food selections since long ago. Any dish or restaurant that wins recognition gets listed in the guide.

t_ch: 但妖精们并不懂得烹饪，在各位的餐馆开张前，收录的菜品其实寥寥无几。
t_en: But back then, fairies didn't know how to cook. Before your restaurants opened, there were hardly any dishes in the book at all.

t_ch: 都是些譬如「生拌刺刺果」、「腌渍蜜蜜花」之类极为简单的食物…妖精虽然热爱美食，花了很多心思在料理研究上，实则连最基本的烹饪方式都不会呢。
t_en: Just a few super simple things, like Raw Quillorb Salad or Pickled Honey Blossom... They adore good food and put a lot of heart into studying it, but when it comes to actual cooking, they can't grasp even the basics.

t_ch: 你怎么成了评审员？
t_en: How did you become a culinary judge?

t_ch: 我…正如评审会上所说，我原本应聘了餐馆的厨师，却未能通过考核，好在对美食品鉴还有些心得，便接受邀请，成为了评审嘉宾。
t_en: I... well, like I said at the review, I originally applied to be a chef, but I failed the cooking test. Luckily, I've still got a decent palate. So they invited me to join as a guest judge instead.

t_ch: 没能实现主厨梦想虽有些遗憾，但能成为迷其林评审员，也算是紧密相关了吧。
t_en: It's a bit of a shame, not realizing my dream of becoming a chef. But I guess being a Memchelin judge still counts as staying close to the craft.

t_ch: 谢谢，我们会继续努力的！
t_en: Thank you! We'll keep doing our best!

t_ch: 嗯。我也很期待在后续的美食评审会上，品尝各位准备的菜品。
t_en: I'll be looking forward to tasting your dishes in future reviews too.

t_ch: 星级提升固然值得庆祝，但后续需处理的事务也会增加。机遇同样是考验。
t_en: Increasing our star rank is worth celebrating, sure, but our responsibilities will also increase. Opportunity is also a test.

t_ch: 店长若是空闲，不妨提前做好规划。
t_en: If you've got time, best start planning ahead.

t_ch: 餐馆获得迷其林认证后，来用餐的顾客也会变多。得着手研发些新菜品了。
t_en: With the "Memchelin" seal of approval, we'll see more customers flowing in. Time to whip up some new dishes.

t_ch: …试试在沙拉里加入煎肉排怎么样？
t_en: ...How about pan-seared steak in a salad?

t_ch: 第一次迷其林美食评审，顺利通过！小灰做得很棒哦，要表扬。
t_en: We passed our first Memchelin Food Review! Little Gray, you did awesome, seriously! Praise time~

t_ch: *我们*也会想办法，努力帮上更多忙的！
t_en: We'll try our best too, and help out even more!

t_ch: 「甜蜜蜜节」就要结束啦。究竟谁做的菜更甜，还是没能得出结论呢。
t_en: The Sweetie Festival is almost over. And we still haven't figured out whose dish was the sweetest.

t_ch: 但是，小小蝶，很喜欢！
t_en: But Little Cas loved every bite!

t_ch: 缇宁会把菜谱都记录下来，留给其余厨师去研究。
t_en: Trinnon will make sure to record all the recipes, and leave them for other chefs to study.

t_ch: 书名我都想好了。
t_en: I've even thought of the perfect title for the book.

t_ch: 既然是缇宝、缇宁和缇安提出的难题，干脆就叫做「三缇问题」吧！
t_en: Since it was Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne who proposed the challenge, why not call it "The TTT Conundrum?"

t_ch: 小灰！*我们*完成了布置的任务，把「甜蜜蜜节」办得很出色！
t_en: Little Gray! We did it! We nailed the mission and made the Sweetie Festival a big success!

t_ch: 考试，通过了。小妖精，也很喜欢！
t_en: Test passed. The fairies are very pleased!

t_ch: *我们*很期待，下个主题活动会是什么呢？
t_en: We can't wait to see what the next theme event will be!

t_ch: 三位老师准备的菜品都很优秀，通过美食评审也是理所应当。
t_en: All three teachers prepared excellent dishes. It's only natural that your restaurant passed the food review.

t_ch: 餐馆星级提升，在迷境的关注度也将大幅增加，期待各位后续能拿出更令人惊喜的菜品。
t_en: Now that the restaurant's rating has gone up, its popularity in the Maze is bound to skyrocket. I look forward to seeing what delicious surprises you all come up with next.

t_ch: 老大，你可算出现了！差点…迷境差点就要被那些菜淹没了迷！
t_en: Boss, finally! We almost... almost got buried in an avalanche of food, mem!

t_ch: 无须担心。店长和两位主厨自然会有分寸。
t_en: No need to panic. The manager and two chefs know what they're doing.

t_ch: 没想到你就是「第五天王」！
t_en: Wait, you're the "Fifth Overlord"!?

t_ch: 嗯…似乎确有这个称呼。但我所做的，无非是帮妖精们解决了些积攒的果物。
t_en: Hmm... That title does ring a bell. All I did was help the fairies clear their backlog of fruits. Nothing more than that.

t_ch: 不是普通的刺刺果！而是究极盐味爆酸蜜渍椒椒果迷！
t_en: Not just a Quillorb or two, either! It was the Ultimate Salted Sour-Honey Chili Fruit, mem!

t_ch: 顺便告诉你，老大的美食理念就是：食物，总会找到自己的出路迷！
t_en: By the way, Boss's gourmet philosophy is: "Food will always find a way."

t_ch: 总有喜欢吃的人是吧？
t_en: There's always someone who'll like it, huh?

t_ch: 该写进剑旗爵的名言里了。
t_en: That one's worthy of being added to Dux Gladiorum's collection of quotes.

t_ch: 纠正下，我没有说过这句话。原话应该是：深海能包容所有事物。
t_en: Correction, I never said that. What I actually said was: "The deep sea accepts all goods."

t_ch: 食物…事物…在我们看来根本没区别迷！
t_en: Food... Goods... honestly, we don't see the difference, mem!

t_ch: 好在海瑟音阁下解决了危机，否则我和另外两位评审员恐怕真要被困在此处了。
t_en: Good thing Lady Hysilens stepped in and resolved the crisis. Otherwise, the other two judges and I might still be trapped in there.

t_ch: 希望两位主厨注意，竞赛不要再波及到无辜的旁人了……
t_en: I hope both chefs will be more mindful next time. Try not to drag innocent bystanders into your little competitions...

t_ch: …就到此为止吧。
t_en: ...That's enough for now.

t_ch: 哈哈。我倒是许久没有这么尽情地做过菜了，烹饪还是要有对手才有意思啊！
t_en: Haha. It's been ages since I cooked with this much passion. Cooking's way more fun when there's a worthy rival!

t_ch: 哼。别忘了，我们是餐馆主厨，要迎合顾客的口味。
t_en: Hmph. Don't forget, we're the chefs. We cook for the guests, not for ourselves.

t_ch: 不用担心，我记得。好了，角斗结束，该帮忙去收拾空盘子了。
t_en: No worries. I haven't forgotten. Well then, duel's over. Let's clean up those empty plates.

t_ch: …看不出来，海瑟音小姐原来胃口这么大啊。
t_en: ...Who would've thought Lady Hysilens had such an appetite?

t_ch: 经营餐馆如同治理城邦，须思虑周全后再行事。店长做好开店的准备了么？
t_en: Running a restaurant is no different from governing a city-state. Every move must be cautiously considered. Manager, are you ready to open for business?

t_ch: 开始今日的经营。
t_en: Let's begin today's business.

t_ch: 想和你聊聊团队里的员工。
t_en: I want to talk about the team.

t_ch: 呵。此处能汇聚如此多位英雄，共同为经营之事出谋献策，我很满意。
t_en: Heh. Honestly, I'm quite pleased to have gathered so many capable heroes, all lending their talents to this venture.

t_ch: 店长想聊些什么？
t_en: What would you like to discuss?

t_ch: 关于餐馆主管…
t_en: About the Restaurant Supervisor...

t_ch: 「餐馆主管」一职目前归在我名下。此外，金织爵也会做些辅助工作。
t_en: The role of the Restaurant Supervisor currently falls under my purview. Dux Goldweaver assists me from time to time as well.

t_ch: 好在团队中的各位都极为尽职，无须我多费心神。我也得以将精力集中在经营发展之事上，思虑未来的规划。
t_en: Thankfully, everyone on the team is dedicated and capable. It spares me from having to micromanage, allowing me to focus on business development and long-term growth.

t_ch: 呵。听起来似乎清闲，每日要面对的却是极为冗杂的数据报表，与无尽的客诉，实在是恼人啊。
t_en: Sounds idle, doesn't it? In reality, it's all endless stacks of data reports, and a never-ending flood of customer complaints. Utterly annoying.

t_ch: 关于主厨…
t_en: About the Chef...

t_ch: 听说这位主厨自小便与妖精相识，想必也极为了解此地顾客的口味吧。
t_en: I heard this chef's been close with the fairies since childhood. I assume that means he has a strong grasp of the local clientele's tastes.

t_ch: 只是…我也不理解，为何他会如此钟情沙拉呢？
t_en: Still... I don't understand why he's so obsessed with salads.

t_ch: 身为悬锋王储，厨艺却如此精湛，传出去想必许多人也不会信吧。
t_en: The crown prince of Kremnos, yet blessed with such remarkable culinary talent. Most people wouldn't believe it if you told them.

t_ch: 如今餐馆有两位主厨坐镇，倒是免去了菜品方面的担忧。但…呵，争斗之事怕是难以避免了。
t_en: Now that we've got two chefs holding the fort, there's no longer any need to worry about menu variety. Though... heh, I suppose some conflict is inevitable.

t_ch: 关于送餐服务负责人…
t_en: About the Delivery Coordinators...

t_ch: 命运爵步履轻快，擅长传递联结之事，这份职务由她们担任再合适不过。
t_en: Dux Fatorum move with light feet and excel in delivering items and connecting people, so they are perfectly suited for this role.

t_ch: 仅有的忧虑，便是她们与此处的妖精过从甚密，难以严厉管控手下员工。不过，这或许也是优势。
t_en: My only concern is their overly close relationship with the local fairies, which makes it difficult for them to impose strict discipline on the delivery crew. Still, that might not be a flaw but rather an asset.

t_ch: 还有…咳，刻意提及凯撒的身高乃是僭越，在此地我就不多追究了。
t_en: Oh, and... ahem. Openly commenting on the Imperator's height is a breach of etiquette. I'll let it slide this time.

t_ch: 关于农林专家…
t_en: About the Agricultural Experts...

t_ch: 我与这两位树庭学者并不熟识，但从农田情况来看，才能无疑极为出色。
t_en: I'm not particularly familiar with the two Grove scholars, but judging by the state of the farmland, their talents are beyond question.

t_ch: 其中某位乖张的行事风格，我也略有耳闻。但有何妨？只要能为餐馆所用，保证农作物的丰收便已足够。
t_en: I've heard whispers about one of them having a rather eccentric disposition, but does it matter? So long as they serve the restaurant well and ensure a bountiful harvest, that's all we need.

t_ch: 没什么想聊的了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 下次再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up another time!

t_ch: 无妨。我就在此等候。
t_en: No trouble at all. I'll be here.

t_ch: 近期客流量有显著提升，以甜食为主题的决议很正确。只是，经营压力增加，命运爵要忙的事就很多了。
t_en: Customer numbers have been on a sugar high lately, proving our sweet-themed strategy was exactly the right flavor. Of course, now Dux Fatorum has to juggle many more items on their daily menu.

t_ch: 「主厨角斗」引来了许多关注，那位白发的主厨也在认真磨砺厨艺。看来，这将会是场激烈的争锋。
t_en: The "Chef Showdown" has really stirred the pot of public interest, and that white-haired chef has been cooking up a storm in practice. Looks like we're in for quite the culinary battle.

t_ch: 悬锋主厨看似自信满满，手头的操练却从未放松。究竟谁胜谁负，连我都不禁有些好奇了。
t_en: Despite the Kremnoan Chef's obvious confidence, he never turns down the heat on his training. I must admit, even I'm hungry to see who will win.

t_ch: 如此神奇的巨型果实，我也是初次见到。那位学者似乎对自己的成果很满意，正在加紧培育新品种。只希望别再闹出那么大的动静了。
t_en: I've never seen such extraordinary giant fruits before. The scholar appears satisfied with the current results and is working faster on new varieties. Hopefully without another fruitful disaster.

t_ch: 促销确实是迅速消耗库存的办法，但该如何招徕更多顾客，就得看捷足爵的本事了。
t_en: Promotions may help burn through stock fast, but how do we attract more customers? That is up to Dux Celeripes' talent.

t_ch: 想和你复盘餐馆办的活动。
t_en: I'd like to review our restaurant event with you.

t_ch: 呵，不得不说，举办经营活动确实是步好棋，既能吸引客流，也足以展现各位负责人的才能。店长的决策相当出色。
t_en: Heh. I'll admit, launching a restaurant event is indeed a good move. It brings in traffic and gives each department head a chance to shine. Smart decision, manager.

t_ch: 具体想聊些什么？
t_en: What exactly do you want to talk about?

t_ch: 关于「甜蜜蜜节」…
t_en: About the Sweetie Festival...

t_ch: 命运爵的身高还不及厨房那口大锅，却深谙待客之道，倒是令人赞叹。
t_en: Dux Fatorum can barely reach the top of the kitchen pot, yet she's a natural at hospitality. Truly impressive.

t_ch: 餐馆经营本就众口难调，选择甜食作为最初的主题无疑很明智，符合食材储备状况，也能最大限度地满足顾客要求。
t_en: Running a restaurant means you can't please everyone, so choosing sweets as the first theme is definitely a smart call. It works perfectly with our current ingredient stock while delivering maximum customer satisfaction.

t_ch: 至于最甜的菜…呵，想来她们心中其实早有答案。
t_en: As for the sweetest dish... Heh, I'm pretty sure they already know the answer in their hearts.

t_ch: 关于「主厨角斗」…
t_en: About the Chef Showdown...

t_ch: 哈哈哈，谁能想到两位主厨间的争斗，竟引发了整个妖精居所的轰动。
t_en: Hahaha! Who'd have thought a duel between our two chefs would stir up such a commotion in the fairies' domain?

t_ch: 好在剑旗爵及时出现，这才避免了动乱扩大。两位主厨的技艺固然高超，想要满足「海洋」半神的胃口又谈何容易，我是从未见过。
t_en: Good thing Dux Gladiorum showed up just in time to stop things from spiraling further. The two chefs' skills are truly top-tier, no doubt. But pleasing the demigod of Ocean is no easy feat. At least, I've never seen it done myself.

t_ch: 但餐馆藉此机会打响了在迷境的知名度，确是好事。
t_en: Still, the restaurant made quite a splash in the Maze. That's worth celebrating.

t_ch: 关于「丰收节」…
t_en: About the Harvest Festival...

t_ch: 没想到那位学者真能培育出如此巨大的作物，后厨再不用为食材发愁了。
t_en: Who would've thought that scholar could actually grow crops that massive? The kitchen won't have to worry about running out of ingredients anytime soon.

t_ch: 至于堆积浪费…想消耗掉这些蔬菜多的是办法，总比无米之炊要好。
t_en: As for the surplus... plenty of ways to put it to use. Better that than starving with empty pots.

t_ch: 关于「大促销」…
t_en: About the Great Sale...

t_ch: 性价比永远是最终的追求，人性本来如此，妖精自然也不例外。
t_en: Value for money is always the ultimate pursuit. It's human nature, and fairies are no exception.

t_ch: 捷足爵的眼光很准，知道顾客在乎什么。同时，呵…取走那枚金币说明，她也清楚自己真正在乎的是什么。
t_en: Dux Celeripes sure has an eye for what customers really want. And... heh, by pocketing that coin, she showed she knows exactly what she values too.

t_ch: 没什么想聊的了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 餐馆的经营事务繁忙，有劳店长费心了。
t_en: Managing a restaurant is no easy feat. You have my thanks, Manager.

t_ch: 最近在忙什么？
t_en: What have you been working on lately?

t_ch: 受凯撒所托，我在迷境内布设了金线。往后，各位可自由使用万帷网了。
t_en: At the Imperator's request, I've been setting up golden threads across the Maze. You'll now be able to access the World Wound Web freely.

t_ch: 说来奇怪，此处妖精数量繁多，金线却没有感受到丝毫颤动，实在有些反常。
t_en: Strange... despite the dense fairy population here, the golden threads haven't picked up a single tremor. Quite odd.

t_ch: 不过…呵，店长似乎知晓其中的缘由，我也便不多追究了。
t_en: But... heh, I suspect you already know why that is. So I won't pry.

t_ch: 你和海瑟音很熟悉吧？
t_en: Do you know Hysilens well?

t_ch: 那是自然。我的剑技便是由剑旗爵所授，所有黄金裔中，唯有她最为熟悉宴会之事。餐馆管理方面，有不少知识需要向她请教。
t_en: Naturally. My swordsmanship was taught to me by none other than Dux Gladiorum herself. Among all the Chrysos Heirs, she's by far the most versed in hosting banquets. When it comes to running a restaurant, there's much I still need to learn from her.

t_ch: 呵…说起来，还未去问她中意的新衣款式呢。
t_en: Heh... come to think of it, I still haven't asked which dress style she prefers lately.

t_ch: 下次再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up another time!

t_ch: 万帷网还需专人维护，店长若有事，可随时来此处寻我。
t_en: The World Wound Web still needs ongoing maintenance anyway. If anything comes up, you know where to find me.

t_ch: 不会挥剑的鉴宝师不是好主厨！哈哈，有段时间没做菜了，没想到重新上手意外地轻松。
t_en: A treasure appraiser who can't swing a sword is no real chef! Haha, it's been a while since I last cooked, but getting back into it was surprisingly easy.

t_ch: 厨房工作如何了？
t_en: How's the kitchen holding up?

t_ch: 一切顺利。农田送来的食材很充足，餐馆的主推菜品也相当受顾客欢迎，就是人手有点不够，每天都忙得手忙脚乱的。
t_en: Things are going smoothly. The farmland's supplying plenty of ingredients, and our signature dishes are a big hit with the customers. We're just a bit short on hands... the kitchen's absolute chaos every day.

t_ch: 等厨师妖精熟悉手头的工作后，情况会有所改善吧，现在就只能靠我先顶着了。
t_en: Once the fairy chef gets more used to the workflow, it should ease up. For now, I'll just have to shoulder the load.

t_ch: 不过，这就是主厨的职责啊。我还挺乐在其中的。
t_en: But hey, that's what being a head chef is all about. I'm honestly enjoying it.

t_ch: 下次再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up another time!

t_ch: 没问题！店长可以随时来察看厨房的情况。
t_en: Sure thing! You're always welcome to swing by the kitchen anytime, Manager.

t_ch: 瞧瞧，比拳头还大的土黄豆，我还是第一次见。你那边的收获如何？
t_en: Look here, soybeans bigger than my fist... Never seen anything like it before. How's the harvest going on your end?

t_ch: 砂锅大的萝卜，见过吗？
t_en: Ever seen a radish the size of a clay pot?

t_ch: …是我输了。
t_en: ...I lost.

t_ch: …记下来。经过重新栽培，实验组的单位产量相较对照组，增加了约三成。
t_en: ...Note this down. After replanting, the experimental batch yielded approximately <unbreak>30%</unbreak> more than the control group.

t_ch: 是受到炼金药的影响吗，还是纯粹的偶然现象呢？
t_en: Could it be due to the alchemical solution? Or perhaps just a fluke?

t_ch: 现在还不清楚。按我测定的土壤数据，多设置几组实验，这次注意控制光照变量。
t_en: Too early to tell. Based on my soil data, we should run a few more trials, this time with better control over light exposure.

t_ch: 两位农林专家，好认真啊！
t_en: You two agricultural specialists are taking this really seriously!

t_ch: 呀，是灰宝！妖精们这么喜欢美食，我们当然要拿出全部本事来啦。
t_en: Ah, hey there, Grayie! Fairies love good food, so of course we're going all out.

t_ch: 只是做些基础研究罢了。风堇，刚才说的都记好了么？
t_en: This is just basic research. Hyacine, did you note down everything I just said?

t_ch: 记好啦。另外，老师刚才还说过：「自己种的胡萝卜，味道果然很不错啊！」…这句话也要记吗？
t_en: Yup, all recorded. Oh, and you also said, "Carrots I grow myself really do taste better!" Should I write that down too?

t_ch: …那个就不必了。
t_en: ...That won't be necessary.

t_ch: 还是不打扰了…
t_en: I better leave you alone then...

t_ch: 两位农林专家还在讨论着诸如「显性与隐性」、「分离与融合」之类的学术词汇，暂时别去打扰了吧。
t_en: The two agricultural experts are still deep in conversation, tossing around academic terms like "dominant vs. recessive" and "segregation and recombination." Best not interrupt for now.

t_ch: 缇宝，在思考加快上菜速度的方法~
t_en: Tribbie's thinking of ways to speed up food delivery~

t_ch: 缇安，跑得很快！
t_en: Trianne's superfast on her feet!

t_ch: 缇宁，可以改造*我们*的小火箭。
t_en: Trinnon can modify our little rocket!

t_ch: 服务员的培训还顺利吗？
t_en: How's the server training going?

t_ch: 很顺利哦，小灰不用担心。小妖精们的动作很快，对工作也很有热情！
t_en: All smooth sailing, no worries, Little Gray! The fairies work at lightning speed, and they're super motivated to boot!

t_ch: 缺点是，喜欢偷吃菜！
t_en: The only problem is that they keep sneaking bites of the food.

t_ch: 缇宁提醒过好几次，但收效甚微。
t_en: Trinnon's warned them several times, but it hasn't really helped much.

t_ch: *我们*知道该怎么做，下次，就让小凯撒来当监督，绝对能管住小妖精们！
t_en: We know what to do! Next time, we'll ask the little Imperator to be the supervisor. She'll definitely keep little fairies in line!

t_ch: 下次再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up another time!

t_ch: 小灰去忙自己的事情吧，*我们*会努力的！
t_en: Go handle your business, Little Gray! We'll do our best!

t_ch: 我不习惯做饭的时候有人看着。什么事？
t_en: I'm not used to cooking with someone watching. What is it?

t_ch: 想看你做饭的样子。
t_en: I just want to see you cook.

t_ch: 也罢。
t_en: Fine.

t_ch: 烹饪与作战类似，需要持久的恒心与一击必杀的决断。
t_en: Cooking, like combat, demands both relentless persistence and decisive verdict.

t_ch: 若是求快，容易过了火候。但反复炖煮也会破坏菜品的口感。
t_en: Rush it, and you'll overcook. But simmer too long, and the texture falls apart.

t_ch: 说再多也没用，本事是练出来的。这口锅就留在这里，想试的时候随便用。
t_en: Words mean little, for skill comes from practice. I'll leave this pot here. Use it whenever you feel like trying your hand.

t_ch: 就是检查下你们的工作。
t_en: Just checking in on your work.

t_ch: 哼。请便。
t_en: Hmph. Suit yourself.

t_ch: 嘿，灰子，闲着没事，到处视察工作呢？
t_en: Hey there, Gray Mystery! Making the rounds, huh?

t_ch: 别那么卷嘛，这儿的日子可轻松了，喝喝茶，吹吹风，享受难得的假期，多好呀。
t_en: Don't overdo it. Life's easy here. Sip some tea, feel the breeze, and enjoy the rare vacation. Isn't it awesome?

t_ch: 那很有生活了。
t_en: Sounds like the good life.

t_ch: 退休后过上慢生活，这可是我的人生理想，真心的，不骗你。
t_en: It is! This is my dream for retirement, slow and peaceful. I swear I'm not lying.

t_ch: 哎，和那群小动物相处久了，感觉自己的整个节奏都慢了下来，手脚没那么利索了，连说话都染上了「迷」的口癖。
t_en: Well, spending time with all those little critters... I think they're slowing me down! My reflexes aren't what they used to be, and I've even picked up their little "mem" speech quirk.

t_ch: 用进废退，用进废退啊！你说，以后我还能重拾起老本行吗？…迷？
t_en: Use it or lose it, huh? Think I'll ever get back into my old groove... Mem?

t_ch: 下次再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up another time!

t_ch: 真没意思。行吧，知道你是店长，有好多事情要忙。都忙，忙点好啊！
t_en: Boring! But fine, fine. I get it. You're the manager. You've got lots on your plate. Busy's good!

t_ch: 小灰鱼儿有空在此逡巡，不如多花些时间，与同伴享受难得的欢宴时光。
t_en: Little Gray Fry, if you have time to wander around, you should spend more of it enjoying this rare celebration with your companions.

t_ch: 为什么你不去呢？
t_en: Why aren't you joining them?

t_ch: 凯撒似乎很享受这场宴会，作为剑旗，我只需站在暗处，随时待命即可。
t_en: The Imperator seems to be enjoying the feast quite a bit. As the Gladius, it is my duty to remain in the shadows and stay always ready.

t_ch: 并且…餐馆好似熙攘的浅滩，于我而言有些喧嚣了。
t_en: Besides... the restaurant feels like a bustling shallows, leaving my senses stranded in its noise.

t_ch: 你和阿格莱雅很熟悉吧？
t_en: You and Aglaea are close, right?

t_ch: 我与金织爵都曾随凯撒作战，彼此早已熟识。初到妖精居所时，她还戏称要为我缝制适合此次盛宴的华服…不，或许她是真有打算吧。
t_en: Dux Goldweaver and I fought alongside the Imperator. We go way back. When I first arrived in the fairies' domain, she even joked about making me a fancy outfit suitable for this feast... Actually, she might not have been joking.

t_ch: 自从接过「浪漫」的神权后，倒是许久未见她露出如此轻快的神情了。
t_en: Ever since she took up the divine authority of "Romance," I haven't seen her look so relaxed in a long, long time.

t_ch: 下次再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up another time!

t_ch: 洋流终将汇聚，小灰鱼儿不必太过介怀。
t_en: Currents always converge in the end. Don't let it weigh on you, Little Gray Fry.

t_ch: 听着人家讲的故事，就这么睡过去了。瞧你迷糊的表情，是不是也做了个甜甜的梦呢？
t_en: You dozed off while listening to the story. Seeing how dazed you are, am I right to presume you had a sweet dream, too?

t_ch: 我遇见了好多熟人…
t_en: I saw so many familiar faces...

t_ch: 和伙伴们共同度过的时光确实很愉快，所以，就把这份回忆牢牢记在心间吧。
t_en: The times spent with companions are indeed truly delightful, so keep these memories close to your heart.

t_ch: 在梦里吃到了好吃的…
t_en: Had some delicious food in my dream...

t_ch: 是呀。木盆堆满了蔬菜，桌上到处都是好吃的菜品，现在仿佛都还能闻到香气呢。
t_en: Did you, now? The wooden basins were filled with vegetables, and delicious dishes covered every inch of the table. I can almost still smell that mouthwatering aroma.

t_ch: 和小妖精们玩得很开心…
t_en: I had a blast with the fairies...

t_ch: 我就知道，你肯定会受小妖精欢迎。它们也期盼着认识新朋友，一起开心地玩呀。
t_en: I knew you'd be popular with the little fairies. They've been looking forward to making new friends and having fun together.

t_ch: 所以…这一切都只是故事吗？
t_en: So... was this all just a story?

t_ch: 故事就是这样，有着无限的可能性，总是出乎意料，却也令人着迷。
t_en: That's the beauty of stories. They hold endless possibilities, always surprising, yet utterly captivating.

t_ch: 好啦，既然故事的发生地是在迷路迷境，还有兴致的话，不妨再去看看吧。
t_en: Alright then. Since this story takes place in the Membrance Maze, why not go check it out if you're still interested?

t_ch: 说不定，会有什么意想不到的事呢？
t_en: Who knows? Something unexpected might happen!

t_ch: 呵呵，店长总算回来了。餐馆再不开门的话，妖精们可都要饿坏了哪。
t_en: Heh, the manager's finally back. The fairies would've starved if we kept the restaurant closed any longer.

t_ch: 呵，店长，我在此等候你许久了。餐馆工作不容怠慢，要认真对待每次经营迷。
t_en: Heh, manager, I've been waiting here for you for quite a while. Restaurant work isn't something to slack off on. You've got to take every business day seriously, mem.

t_ch: 餐馆…居然真的存在。
t_en: The restaurant... it actually exists?

t_ch: 你们都叫我「店长」？
t_en: Why are you all calling me "manager"?

t_ch: 店长在说什么，外面的世界再怎么好玩，也别忘了妖精们还在这里等你回来迷！
t_en: What are you saying, manager? No matter how fun the outside world is, don't forget that we fairies are still here waiting for you to come back, mem!

t_ch: 等你回来，给我们做好多好吃的迷！
t_en: We'll wait for you to come back and make us lots of yummy food, mem!

t_ch: 呵。经营餐馆是迷路迷境的大事，需要认真对待。店长做好开店的准备了迷？
t_en: Heh. Running a restaurant is a big deal in the Membrance Maze. We need to take it seriously. Are you ready to open for business, mem?

t_ch: 开始今日的经营。
t_en: Let's begin today's business.

t_ch: 关于这家餐馆的来历…
t_en: About this restaurant's history...

t_ch: 迷…店长难道忘了吗，虽然餐馆很早就建好了，但妖精根本不知道怎么用……
t_en: Uh... Manager, did you forget? Even though the restaurant was built a long time ago, the fairies had no idea how to use it...

t_ch: 是你突然出现在迷路迷境，帮我们复兴了荒废的餐馆迷！
t_en: But you suddenly appeared in the Membrance Maze and helped us revive the abandoned restaurant, mem!

t_ch: 还教会了妖精种地和做饭的方法，让我们尝到了好多美食！大家都很感谢你！
t_en: You even taught the fairies how to farm and cook, letting us taste so many delicious food! You have no idea how grateful we are to you!

t_ch: 原来我这么厉害…
t_en: I had no idea I was this awesome...

t_ch: 迷！店长就是很厉害，是迷路迷境的贵客。
t_en: Mem! You're incredible, a VIP of the Membrance Maze.

t_ch: 你有见过我的伙伴们吗？
t_en: Have you seen my friends around?

t_ch: …迷？店长的伙伴？不太清楚，我只见过小涟，她也帮了不少忙。
t_en: ...Mem? Your friends? Not sure. I've only met Reney. She's been quite helpful, too.

t_ch: 好像忘了什么事…但不重要！总之，店长想开店的时候，就随时找我迷！
t_en: Feels like I forgot something... but whatever! Just hit me up whenever you wanna open up for business, mem!

t_ch: 能不能别学别人说话了…
t_en: Can you maybe stop copying how others talk...

t_ch: 迷！可是，我觉得这样的说话方式好威风，好有气势，好多妖精都会听我的。
t_en: Mem! But I think this way of talking makes me sound so cool and powerful. All the other fairies will totally listen to me.

t_ch: 至于是从哪学来的，我也记不清了迷…或许，是在某个梦里？
t_en: As for where I learned it from, I can't quite remember... Maybe in some dream?

t_ch: 不重要！总之，店长想开店的时候，就随时找我迷！
t_en: Doesn't matter! Anyway, hit me up whenever you want to open up shop, mem!

t_ch: 再等等吧。
t_en: Wait a moment.

t_ch: 无妨。我会一直在这里等店长迷！
t_en: No worries. I'll wait right here for you, mem!

t_ch: 表演锐意制作中……
t_en: Preparing the performance...

t_ch: 对不起，「青春岁月」，我们的复仇之路到此为止了。「魔古拉帮」实在是太强了。
t_en: I'm sorry, Golden Youth, but this is where our path of vengeance ends. The Mogura Gang is just too powerful.

t_ch: …不死途大哥，我知道你已经尽力了。呜呜呜，难道我的青春，注定要留下遗憾了吗？
t_en: ...Mr. Ashveil, I know you've done your best. *sobs* Is my youth destined to leave me regrets?

t_ch: …请问这是什么情况？
t_en: Uh... what's going on?

t_ch: 糟糕，是{NICKNAME}！「青春岁月」快起来，咱不能给二相乐园丢人。
t_en: Oh cripes, it's {NICKNAME}! Get it together, Golden Youth. We can't bring shame to Planarcadia!

t_ch: （还是假装没看到吧）
t_en: (Better pretend I didn't see that)

t_ch: 站住！这可不能装作没有看见啊。
t_en: Hold it right there! You can't just pretend you didn't see that.

t_ch: 我们俩…只是在这里推杯换盏时不小心滑倒了而已。
t_en: We just... accidentally slipped while having a few drinks, that's all.

t_ch: 没错！绝对不是在残酷的帮派战争中落败了！如果想看笑话的话，请你另寻他处吧！
t_en: That's right! We absolutely did NOT get our butts kicked in a brutal gang war! If you're here to laugh at us, go somewhere else!

t_ch: 残酷的帮派战争是…？
t_en: A brutal gang war...?

t_ch: 可恶，到底还是让你给发现了。「青春岁月」，不必再逞强了，男儿也有低头的时候。
t_en: Darn it, you caught on after all. Golden Youth, no need to keep up the tough act. Everyone has to bow their head sometimes.

t_ch: 其实我没打算笑的…
t_en: I wasn't actually going to laugh...

t_ch: 哼，想笑就笑吧，只是…我希望你不是来可怜我们的，而是助我们一臂之力的。
t_en: Hmph, laugh if you want... I just hope you're not here to pity us, but to lend us a helping hand.

t_ch: 明白，我也不再逞强了。我需要追求纯粹的强大为我的兄弟们争一口气！
t_en: I understand. I won't push myself too hard anymore. I need to pursue true power and earn respect for my brothers!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，这是我一生一次的请求，请你务必接受！事成之后，让我当牛做马也在所不辞，唯独这件事…唯独…这件事……
t_en: {F#Boss Lady}{M#Boss} {NICKNAME}, this is the only request of my life. Please, you must accept it! When it's done, I'll be your loyal servant. I'll do anything to serve you... but this... this one thing...

t_ch: 我死不瞑…目…呃……
t_en: I can't rest... in... peace... ugh...
<size=28>MY—YOUTH! DON'T—LEAVE—!</size>

t_ch: …可恶的「魔古拉帮」！{NICKNAME}，你一定得替「青春岁月」报仇啊。
t_en: ...Curse that Mogura Gang! {NICKNAME}, you must avenge the Golden Youth!

t_ch: 有没有谁能帮我解释一下呢？
t_en: Can someone explain what's going on here?

t_ch: 「青春岁月」，你这就杀青了？
t_en: Golden Youth, are you done already?

t_ch: 它只是没吃饭饿晕过去了而已。别担心，一会指定能醒过来。
t_en: They just passed out from hunger, that's all. Don't worry, they'll definitely come around soon.

t_ch: 我好像有一种被碰瓷的感觉？
t_en: Why do I feel like I'm being set up here?

t_ch: 不，这绝不是街头无赖的伎俩。
t_en: No, this is definitely not some cheap street trick.

t_ch: 这是高傲的男儿将青春回忆托付给了你。
t_en: This proud man has entrusted his youthful memories to you.

t_ch: 我来为你解释。
t_en: Allow me to explain.

t_ch: 这位「青春岁月」小朋友，是人们对青春年华的追忆凝结而成的小小尘灵——理想主义、幼稚、且激情澎湃，最大的爱好是和好朋友们打牌。
t_en: The kid, Golden Youth, is a little wispae formed from the condensed memories of youth. It's idealistic, childish, and passionate, with the greatest hobby of playing cards with friends.

t_ch: 这小家伙有样学样，在二维市北部建立起了名为「牌佬汇」的帮派…说是「帮派」，实际上日常活动就是聚在一起打银河战力党，是个人畜无害的兴趣社团。
t_en: Following suit, this little fella went on to set up a gang of his own called Cardway in northern Duomension City... Though they call themselves a gang, their daily activities just involve getting together to play Cosmicon Collective. In truth, they're basically just a harmless hobby club.

t_ch: 在那以后，它们一直过着「啊！这就是青春」的平凡生活……
t_en: Since then, they've been living a normal life of "Ah! You only live once"...

t_ch: 直到最近，突然出现了一个名为「魔古拉帮」的外国帮派。这伙人的银河战力党水平极为高超，很快就打得牌佬汇溃不成军。
t_en: Until recently, when a foreign gang called the Mogura Gang suddenly appeared. These guys were incredibly skilled in Cosmicon Collective combat, and they quickly crushed the Cardway into total disarray.

t_ch: 惨败之后，「青春岁月」开始四处寻找救兵。可惜，这位大侦探的牌技之臭，只能用「蜣螂抱粪」来形容…所以，就有了刚才向你乞援的一幕。
t_en: After that crushing defeat, Golden Youth went everywhere looking for reinforcements. Unfortunately, this great detective's so bad at cards, it's like watching "a dung beetle hugging its ball of muck"... And that's how you ended up with that pitiful plea for help just now.

t_ch: 仙舟将军爻老板？！何时来的？
t_en: Madam Yao, General of the Xianzhou!? When did you get here?

t_ch: 爻老板？不，你一定是认错人了。我既没有做过老板，也不是什么仙舟将军。
t_en: Madam Yao? No, you must have the wrong person. I've never been of high rank, and I'm certainly no Xianzhou General.

t_ch: 我乃是寄宿于「银河战力党」骰子中的「骰魂」，已在骰中沉睡一千七百年。
t_en: I am the "Dice Soul" bound within the dice of the Cosmicon Collective. I've slumbered inside these dice for seventeen hundred years.

t_ch: 我刚起了一卦，坤上乾下——拔茅征吉，志在外也。{NICKNAME}，你恐怕是战胜「魔古拉帮」，光复「牌佬汇」的最大助力——
t_en: I just cast a divination: "Earth above, Heaven below." Pulling up the reeds brings good fortune, and one's ambition lies afar. {NICKNAME}, you might just be our greatest hope to defeat the Mogura Gang and restore the Cardway to its former glory...

t_ch: 或许…也是让我等待一千七百年，见识到「玄玄妙手」的契机！
t_en: Perhaps... this is the moment I've waited <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years for: To witness the Hand of Mystique!

t_ch: 事不宜迟，现在就让我来替「牌佬汇」试试你的本事！
t_en: Let us dawdle no longer. Let me test your skills on behalf of the Cardway!

t_ch: 接招吧，「骰魂」！
t_en: Prepare yourself, Dice Soul!

t_ch: 气势不错，有点我当年的风采！
t_en: Not bad at all. Reminds me of my old days!

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 不死途大哥！刚冒出来的这个仙舟大姐头是谁啊？是你搬来的救兵吗？
t_en: Yo, brother Ashveil! Who's this Xianzhou boss lady that just showed up? Did you bring her in as backup?

t_ch: …什么仙舟大姐头？我怎么什么都看不见？
t_en: ...What Xianzhou lady? I don't see anyone.

t_ch: 如何，准备好一展身手了吗？
t_en: So, ready to show us what you've got?

t_ch: 接招吧，「骰魂」！
t_en: Prepare yourself, Dice Soul!

t_ch: 气势不错，有点我当年的风采！
t_en: Not bad at all. Reminds me of my old days!

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 水平的确不错，可惜…距离我想见到的「玄玄妙手」，还差了些火候。不过{F#她}{M#他}这身本事用来战胜「魔古拉帮」还是绰绰有余。大侦探，你们找对人了。
t_en: Impressive skills... but still not quite at the level of the Hand of Mystique that I want to see. Still, {F#she}{M#he}'s more than capable enough to take down the Mogura Gang. Great detective, you've found the right person.

t_ch: 你在和谁说话，又在和谁打牌？我怎么什么都看不见？难道这世上真的存在灵异现象？
t_en: Who are you talking to, and who are you playing cards with? I can't see anything! Don't tell me there's actually something supernatural going on here?

t_ch: 这么大一只爻老板你真看不见？
t_en: How could you not see Madam Yao when she's right there in front of you?

t_ch: 难道说，只有我能看见爻老板？
t_en: Wait, am I the only one who can see her?

t_ch: 都说了，我不是什么老板，我是在骰中沉睡一千七百年的「骰魂」。
t_en: I told you, I'm not some "madam." I'm a Dice Soul who's been slumbering inside these dice for seventeen hundred years.

t_ch: 你看，「骰魂」自己都说了，自己不是什么「爻老板」。
t_en: See? Dice Soul just said she's not "Madam Yao" or anything.

t_ch: …咦？你不是看不见我吗？
t_en: ...Huh? I thought you couldn't see me?

t_ch: 哈哈，我这人啊，一上了岁数就喜欢自言自语。
t_en: Haha, well, you know how it is. The older I get, the more I talk to myself.

t_ch: 咳咳…{NICKNAME}，你要学的还有很多。不去看到那些我不该看到的人物，正是名侦探的生存之道。
t_en: Ahem...{NICKNAME}, you still have much to learn. Not seeing things I'm not supposed to see... that's the way of a true detective.

t_ch: 总之，光复「牌佬汇」一事就只能交给你和我了。如果是你{NICKNAME}，也许真的能战胜虎克的左右护法，甚至能战胜虎克本人，彻底瓦解「{RUBY_B#鼹鼠}魔古拉{RUBY_E#}帮」。
t_en: Anyway, restoring the Cardway is now up to just you and me. {NICKNAME}, you might actually be able to defeat Hook's left and right lieutenants, and maybe even Hook herself, bringing down the {RUBY_B#Mole}Mogura{RUBY_E#} Gang once and for all.
Huh!? Who...? Hook???

t_ch: 什么乱七八糟的剧情展开？
t_en: What kind of ridiculous plot twist is this?

t_ch: 虎者，岳岭之威；克者，制敌之要。此人的名字威烈无双，定是一位残暴的对手。
t_en: Hook, a name forged from strength and conquest, a name that carries unmatched ferocity... she must be a formidable foe.

t_ch: 「魔古拉帮」虽是初来乍到，却势不可挡，接连攻城拔寨，改变了鸽川区的势力分布。
t_en: Despite being newcomers, the Mogura Gang rose with unstoppable force, conquering territory after territory and reshaping the power dynamics of Dovebrook District.

t_ch: 三天，她只用了三天。「魔古拉帮」就已经吞并了七个打牌交流会，击溃了三个战力党沙龙。骰巷，梭哈兄弟会，比比大小联盟…已经悉数解散。
t_en: Three days. That's all it took her. In just three days, the Mogura Gang had already absorbed seven card clubs and crushed three Collective salons. The Dice Alley, the Show-Hand Brotherhood, the Betsizing Alliance... all disbanded.

t_ch: 尽管鸽川区的风向变了，但牌佬汇还没有被彻底打败，它的命运现在就在你的手上。
t_en: The tides may have turned in Dovebrook District, but the Cardway hasn't fallen yet. Its fate now lies in your hands.

t_ch: 虎克，你怎么变成了这样？
t_en: Hook, what happened to you?

t_ch: 你或许曾经认识她，但她已经不是你认识的那个人了。
t_en: You might have known her once, but she's not the same person anymore.

t_ch: 这魔古拉帮到底能有多强？
t_en: Just how strong can this Mogura Gang be?

t_ch: 据说，她迄今为止未尝败绩，有着「万夫莫敌之勇」。
t_en: They say she's undefeated to this day, truly a one-woman army.

t_ch: 哼，倒也不必害怕，正所谓「玄之又玄，众妙之门」…你还有着「玄玄妙手」！
t_en: Hmph, no need to be scared. "The most mysterious one among all mysteries, the Gate of Wonders," remember? You still have the Hand of Mystique!

t_ch: 所谓「玄玄妙手」，便是在对局之时，突然领悟的骰子变幻纷繁的奥秘，由此做出了改变局势的决断。越是万般策略皆徒然的时刻，越是可能出现妙手。
t_en: The Hand of Mystique is a moment of sudden enlightenment. When you grasp the mysteries of the ever-changing dice during a match, and make a move that turns the tide. The more hopeless the situation, the more likely that divine play will appear.

t_ch: 身为「骰魂」，我会随时在你身侧进行指导，协助你抵达「银河战力党」的巅峰。
t_en: As a Dice Soul, I'll be by your side to guide you and help you reach the pinnacle of the Cosmicon Collective.

t_ch: 明白了，那就交给我吧。
t_en: I see. Leave it to me.

t_ch: 我就知道你是能探索「银河战力党」之究极的同行者。
t_en: I knew it. You are the perfect companion to explore the ultimate secrets of the Cosmicon Collective with.

t_ch: 好吧…谁叫我喜欢助人为乐呢？
t_en: Well... guess that's what I get for being a helpful person.

t_ch: 太好了。自古以来，唯有古道热肠的良善之人，方能领悟「玄玄妙手」的奥秘。
t_en: Excellent! Since ancient times, only those with kind and benevolent hearts have been able to comprehend the mysteries of the Hand of Mystique.

t_ch: 事已至此，是不是没法拒绝了？
t_en: Looks like there's no backing out now, huh?

t_ch: 我沉睡了一千七百年，此番再度复苏，就是为了见证你使出「玄玄妙手」的瞬间。你可不许临阵脱逃。
t_en: I have slumbered for seventeen hundred years, and I've awakened just to witness the moment you unleash the Hand of Mystique. Don't even think about backing out now.

t_ch: 想要挑战「魔古拉帮」的首领虎克，就需要先战胜她的左右护法——「梆梆•克拉拉」和「音律琴魔•希露瓦」。
t_en: To challenge Hook, the leader of the Mogura Gang, you must first defeat her left and right lieutenants: Help-Me Clara and Melodic Demon Serval.

t_ch: 要是你准备好了，就在这里叫上我们牌佬汇残党，我们会向魔古拉帮下战书的。
t_en: When you're ready, call on the remaining Cardway members, and we'll send the Mogura Gang a challenge letter.

t_ch: 请你给他们下战书吧。
t_en: Send them a challenge letter.

t_ch: 和我们一起踏上无间之道吧。
t_en: Join us and walk the path of retaliation together.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 我要给魔古拉帮下战书。
t_en: I'm gonna send a challenge letter to the Mogura Gang.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，要回到「银河战力党」的残酷世界了吗？下战书的事就请交给我吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}{F#Boss Lady}{M#Boss}, ready to dive back into the brutal world of the "Cosmicon Collective"? Leave the challenge letters to me!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我来赴约了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I have come as promised.

t_ch: 史瓦罗大佬，好久不见。
t_en: Boss Svarog, long time no see.

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。从效率上判断，我们应该立刻开始「银河战力党」对决。
t_en: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. For optimal efficiency, we should begin our Cosmicon Collective duel immediately.

t_ch: 请直接告诉我，虎克在哪里？
t_en: Just tell me straight, where's Hook?

t_ch: 我只是「梆梆•克拉拉」的小弟。结论：我没有帮会头目•虎克的信息权限。
t_en: I am merely a subordinate of Help-Me Clara. Conclusion: I do not possess the clearance to access information on gang leader Hook.

t_ch: 这位铁人往这里一站，我刚才还以为这就是最终决战了，你却告诉我这只是…小弟？
t_en: This iron man shows up here, and I thought we were in for the final boss fight. But you're telling me he's just... a minion?

t_ch: 听人说，虎克身高约六尺二寸，肩宽程度足以让所有门框显得狭窄，看来所言非虚。
t_en: They say Hook stands at six feet two, with shoulders broad enough to make any doorframe look narrow... and it seems they weren't exaggerating at all.

t_ch: 大哥，你别说了，我怕。
t_en: Bro, stop, please, you're scaring me.

t_ch: 呵，我也怕。但是…硬汉可不能任由双腿颤抖，毕竟，我必须前进。
t_en: Heh, I'm scared too. But... a real tough guy doesn't let his knees shake. After all, I've got to keep moving forward.

t_ch: 嘁，虎克就是个小屁孩。
t_en: Pfft, Hook's just a little brat.

t_ch: 呵，我很喜欢你自信的样子，但是…如果我是你，我绝对不会轻敌。
t_en: Heh, I like your confidence, but... if I were you, I definitely wouldn't underestimate your opponent.

t_ch: 逻辑：阻止「鼹鼠党的暴行」，在我看来的确是有必要的。但是现如今，克拉拉已经加入了虎克的帮派游戏之中，她的立场便是我的立场。
t_en: Logic: Stopping the Moles's atrocities is indeed a necessary course of action in my analysis. However, Clara has now joined Hook's gang game, and her position is my position.

t_ch: 我会在*任何冲突*中保护好克拉拉。
t_en: I will protect Clara in any conflict.

t_ch: 结论：{NICKNAME}，如果你想和克拉拉对决，那就在「银河战力党」中先战胜我。
t_en: Conclusion: {NICKNAME}, if you wish to challenge Clara, you must first defeat me in the Cosmicon Collective.

t_ch: 那让我们开始吧！
t_en: Let's get started!

t_ch: 期望你是位够格的对手，能让克拉拉玩得尽兴。
t_en: I expect you to be a worthy opponent who can keep Clara entertained.

t_ch: 你这就是溺爱吧？
t_en: Isn't that just spoiling her?

t_ch: 克拉拉平时很少有机会沉醉于一场游戏。我会确保她玩得尽兴。
t_en: Clara rarely gets the chance to lose herself in a game. So I will ensure she enjoys it to the fullest.

t_ch: 喔，算是个有趣的长辈。真不错。
t_en: Oh, quite an interesting elder. Not bad at all.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}实在是太强了！
t_en: {NICKNAME} is absolutely incredible!

t_ch: 评估结果：{NICKNAME}「银河战力党」游戏水平优秀，可以带给克拉拉充分的挑战与乐趣。接下来是属于她的战斗，我不会给她施加压力。
t_en: Evaluation result: {NICKNAME}'s performance in Cosmicon Collective is excellent, capable of providing Clara with sufficient challenge and enjoyment. The upcoming battle belongs to her, and I will not put pressure on her.

t_ch: 另外，我想告诉你实情——克拉拉其实是想阻止虎克挑战本地帮派的，毕竟虎克她…破坏了「银河战力党」的平衡性。
t_en: Also, there's a fact you should know: Clara actually wanted to stop Hook from challenging the local gangs. After all, Hook... disrupted the balance of the Cosmicon Collective.

t_ch: …若是能有如此牌力，着实令人期待。
t_en: ...With such card skills, it's hard not to get excited.

t_ch: 克拉拉试图安抚流离失所的帮派成员，她是为了照顾新结识的「家人们」而留下的。
t_en: Clara tries to comfort the displaced gang members, having stayed behind to look after her newly found "family."

t_ch: 既然你要挑战虎克，就拿出你的实力向克拉拉证明，你能替她照顾好它们吧！
t_en: Since you wish to challenge Hook, prove your worth to Clara and show that you can take good care of them!

t_ch: 放心交给我吧，史瓦罗大佬。
t_en: Leave it to me, Boss Svarog.

t_ch: 我是来打牌的，真的可以吗？
t_en: I'm just here to play cards. Are you sure that's okay?

t_ch: 高大的铁人，放心吧。我们不会让克拉拉的努力白费的，这是男人之间的约定。
t_en: Don't worry, big metal man. We won't let Clara's efforts go to waste. That's a promise between men.

t_ch: 去吧，「梆梆•克拉拉」可不容小觑。
t_en: Go on. Help-Me Clara is not to be underestimated.

t_ch: 怎么样，{NICKNAME}？你是要现在就给克拉拉下战书，还是要再准备一下？
t_en: So, {NICKNAME}, are you gonna challenge Clara right now, or do you need more time to prepare?

t_ch: 请你给他们下战书吧。
t_en: Send them a challenge letter.

t_ch: 好，交给我吧。
t_en: Alright, leave it to me.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 没想到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}竟然能打倒史瓦罗先生…梆梆我啊，不得不认真起来了。
t_en: I can't believe {F#Big Sister}{M#Big Brother} managed to defeat Mr. Svarog... I'll have to get serious now.

t_ch: 好孩子克拉拉，虎克在哪里？
t_en: Good girl, Clara. Tell me, where's Hook?

t_ch: 对不起，我不能说。毕竟现在梆梆我啊，可是「魔古拉帮」的话事人，是个坏孩子！
t_en: Sorry, I can't divulge that information. After all, I am now a representative of the Mogura Gang. I'm a bad kid now!

t_ch: 哼哼，不过…要是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}能战胜克拉拉，我就可以告诉你。
t_en: Heh heh... but if {F#Big Sister}{M#Big Brother} can beat me, I'll tell you.

t_ch: 不必再逞强了小姑娘，这座城市的风已经告诉我了——你一直都在做好事。
t_en: No need to act tough anymore, little girl. The winds of this city have told me everything. You've been doing good deeds all along.
...Huh?

t_ch: 抱歉呐，小姑娘，我是个侦探。我唯一擅长的事，就是将无人知晓的真相公之于众。
t_en: Sorry, little girl. I'm a detective. The only thing I'm good at is bringing hidden truths to light.

t_ch: 大家早就知道了。
t_en: Everyone already knows.

t_ch: 不对，克拉拉现在很坏很坏，无论面对怎样的对手，梆梆就是两拳。
t_en: No, I am very, very bad now. No matter what kind of opponent I'm facing, I'll be able to give them some punches.

t_ch: 我好喜欢你桀骜不驯的样子～
t_en: I like a rebellious phase.

t_ch: 嘿嘿～就问问{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，梆梆我啊，梆梆不梆梆！
t_en: Hehe~ {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, I'm so wicked, right!?

t_ch: 克拉拉，别跟虎克学坏了～
t_en: Clara, don't let Hook be a bad influence on you~

t_ch: 但是克拉拉还是要遵守和虎克的约定，将话事人身份继续扮演下去…抱歉抱歉～
t_en: But I still have to keep my promise with Hook and continue playing the role of a representative... Sorry, sorry~

t_ch: 请{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}与我对战的时候，千万别客气，千万不要手下留情！
t_en: {F#Big Sis}{M#Big Brother}, please don't hold back when you face me. Give it everything you've got!

t_ch: 我听说「梆梆•克拉拉」的牌风狠辣、不留余地。{NICKNAME}，你可不能轻敌啊。
t_en: I heard that Help-Me Clara plays her cards ruthlessly and shows no mercy. {NICKNAME}, you'd better not underestimate her.

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}接招吧！
t_en: {F#Big Sister}{M#Big Brother}, take this!

t_ch: 是我们赢了，告诉我们吧，小姑娘。虎克在哪里？
t_en: We won. Now tell us, little girl. Where's Hook?

t_ch: 不用问了，我就在这里。
t_en: No need to ask. I'm right here.

t_ch: 什么？！你就是…虎克？
t_en: What!? You're... Hook?

t_ch: …早知道，我就不对着外国人的名字说文解字了。
t_en: ...If I'd known better, I wouldn't have wasted time interpreting that name.

t_ch: 克拉拉，你始终做得很好，可是你错就错在心地善良。
t_en: Clara, you've always done well, but your kindness is your biggest mistake.

t_ch: 怪我，是我对你期望太高了。
t_en: This is my bad. I expected too much from you.

t_ch: 拿着这「除名状」。今天你将被逐出山门，从此以后「魔古拉帮」的远征都与你无关。
t_en: Take this "Expulsion Order." As of today, you're out of the Mogura Gang. From now on, our expeditions have nothing to do with you.

t_ch: …怎么会这样。
t_en: How could this be...

t_ch: 而你呢，荣誉队员，你是来替牌佬汇复仇的，还是说，单纯想来捣乱的？
t_en: And you, honorary member... Are you here to avenge the Cardway, or did you just come to cause trouble?

t_ch: 我是来替本地帮派讨个说法的。
t_en: I'm here to settle the score on behalf of the local gang.

t_ch: 呵呵，可笑。竟然煽动我的老伙计与我为敌，本地帮派太没有礼貌了。
t_en: Heh heh, how laughable. Trying to turn my old pals against me? The local gangs have no manners at all.

t_ch: 我是来教训一个狂妄小屁孩的。
t_en: I'm here to teach a cocky brat a lesson.

t_ch: 教训？就算是在贝洛伯格的时候，也只有老巫婆能教训我。
t_en: A lesson? Even back in Belobog, only the old witch could teach me a lesson.

t_ch: 在二相乐园，没人可以教训我！你也不能，这是我说的！
t_en: Nobody can boss me around in Planarcadia! Not even you. That's what Hook has to say about this!

t_ch: 真是好气魄的小朋友。要是能和你来一把紧张刺激的「银河战力党」，想必{NICKNAME}也能使出我梦寐以求的「玄玄妙手」了。
t_en: What a spirited kid you are! If we could have an intense Cosmicon Collective match, I bet {NICKNAME} could finally pull off the Hand of Mystique move I've always dreamed of.

t_ch: 就在这里做个了断吧，虎克——！
t_en: Let's settle this here and now, Hook!

t_ch: 呵呵，你们这些自诩正义的大人只顾阻止我，却从来没人问我，虎克…你到底想要什么？
t_en: Hehe, you self-righteous adults are so busy trying to stop me, but none of you ever asked Hook... what I really want.

t_ch: 虎克，你到底想要什么？
t_en: Hook... what do you really want?

t_ch: 不会打牌的弱者，你不配发问。
t_en: A weakling who can't play cards is not worthy of asking questions.

t_ch: 我…你…我…哎哟，嗐…！
t_en: I... you... I... ugh, come on...!

t_ch: 去找最后一个话事人「音律琴魔•希露瓦」吧，战胜她之后，我允许你们向我提问。
t_en: Go find the last representative, the Melodic Demon Serval. If you can beat her, I'll allow you to ask me questions.

t_ch: 克拉拉，我们走。
t_en: Clara, let's go.

t_ch: 「希露瓦」…希望恰如瓦片上的朝露，多美的名字啊！
t_en: "Serval"... A name as beautiful as dewdrops on tiles at dawn!

t_ch: 这人怎么也开始说文解字了？是不是跟我学坏了？算了…{NICKNAME}，在下一场对决之前，你需要再准备一会儿吗？
t_en: Why's this guy suddenly going all poetic on us? Did he pick up my bad habits? Oh well... {NICKNAME}, do you need a moment to get ready before the next match?

t_ch: 请你给他们下战书吧。
t_en: Send them a challenge letter.

t_ch: 好的，那下战书的事就交给不死途先生吧！
t_en: Alright, let's leave the challenge letter to Mr. Ashveil!

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 嗨，{NICKNAME}，真是好久不见啊。
t_en: Hey {NICKNAME}, it's been a while!

t_ch: 你怎么变成虎克的手下了？
t_en: How'd you end up working for Hook?

t_ch: 啊？手下？你说我啊？
t_en: Huh? Working for her? You mean me?

t_ch: …原来虎克这小姑娘把我当手下了。
t_en: ...So Hook actually thinks I'm her subordinate.

t_ch: 既然误会已经解除，不妨给我一个面子，承认自己不巧落败了吧。
t_en: Well, since that misunderstanding's cleared up, why don't you do me a favor and admit you just happened to lose?

t_ch: 那可不行！
t_en: No way!

t_ch: 我…你…我…哎哟，嗐…！
t_en: I... you... I... ugh, come on...!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}绝对不能错过任何一位强大对手，只有这样，{F#她}{M#他}才有机会领悟那冠绝古今的「玄玄妙手」。
t_en: {NICKNAME} can't afford to pass up a strong opponent. Only by facing the best can {F#she}{M#he} hope to master the Hand of Mystique, a move unrivaled through the ages.

t_ch: 哈哈，我赞同这位仙舟姐妹的说法。
t_en: Haha, I couldn't agree more with this Xianzhou lady here.

t_ch: …你们俩不会是真的爱打牌吧？
t_en: ...Don't tell me you two actually like playing cards?

t_ch: 打牌和做音乐都是一样的，只有全力以赴拿出真本事，才可能突破自己的瓶颈。
t_en: Playing cards and making music are the same. Only when you go all out can you break through your limits.

t_ch: 就让我来助你，准备应战吧，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Let me help you with that. Get ready for battle, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 我玩银河战力党这么久，还没遇到过几个像你这么厉害的对手呢。
t_en: I've played Cosmicon Collective for a long time, but I've met very few opponents as skilled as you.

t_ch: 不过…呵呵，其实我还没有拿出*真正的实力*。
t_en: But... hehe, I haven't even shown my true power yet.

t_ch: 难道说，你还能将{NICKNAME}的牌艺再往上推高一层？
t_en: Are you saying you can improve {NICKNAME}'s card skills even more?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}算是我最喜欢的{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，我会亲自指导{F#她}{M#他}。
t_en: {NICKNAME}'s my favorite {F#little sister}{M#little brother}, I'll be giving {F#her}{M#him} personal lessons.

t_ch: …等等，这不是已经把话事人解决了，我们现在应该直奔虎克呀。
t_en: ...Wait, haven't we already taken care of the representatives? We should be going straight for Hook.

t_ch: 你这老古董，漫画还是看太少了！
t_en: You old fossil. Clearly, you need to read more comics!

t_ch: 一味挑战强者只会让读者疲惫。适当地插入「训练篇」，有缓有急，节奏才会变舒服。
t_en: Constantly challenging stronger opponents will only exhaust the readers. Properly inserting "training arcs" creates a comfortable rhythm with both slow and fast-paced moments.

t_ch: 这都什么时候了，还看漫画！
t_en: We can't be reading comics at a time like this!

t_ch: 你不看漫画，难道你还能看得见我吗？
t_en: If you can't read comics, then can you see me?

t_ch: 我…你…我、我看不见你。哎呀…你们快点！
t_en: I... you... I—I can't see you. Uhh, just... hurry up, you folks!

t_ch: 别急，你们就在这里等我，我去去就来。
t_en: Don't worry. Just wait here, I'll be back before you know it.

t_ch: 虽然她说自己「去去就来」，但在这里干等着可不符合「银河战力党」的礼仪——按规矩，我们必须再给她一封正式的战书！你准备好了吗？
t_en: Even though she said she'd "be back before we know it," just standing around here isn't the Cosmicon Collective way. By the rules, we must issue her another formal challenge letter! Are you ready?

t_ch: 请你给他们下战书吧。
t_en: Send them a challenge letter.

t_ch: 没问题…诶？我是不是可以直接复用上一封战书？反正都是写给同一个人的。
t_en: No problem... Oh wait! Can't I just reuse the last challenge letter? I mean, it's going to the same person anyway.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 又见面了，朋友们。
t_en: We meet again, friends.

t_ch: 感觉贝洛伯格的人全来了。
t_en: Looks like everyone from Belobog showed up.

t_ch: 不，我哥就没有来。
t_en: No, my brother didn't come.

t_ch: 所以，你也找到了背后灵？
t_en: So, you've found your own spirit sidekick too?

t_ch: 不，我俩都是活着的。
t_en: No, we're both alive.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这一次你们面对的对手不是我，而是我们——「朗道一家」。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, this time your opponent isn't just me. You are facing the "Landau Family."

t_ch: 原来如此。藉由「家族爱」的力量，希露瓦小姐的实力得到了巨大飞跃，可谓合情合理。
t_en: I see. Through the power of "family love," Miss Serval's strength has taken a huge leap. Makes perfect sense.

t_ch: 你怎么还替她解释起来了？
t_en: Why are you making excuses for her?

t_ch: 玲可，你怎么也来了？
t_en: Lynx, what are you doing here?

t_ch: 玲可眼神坚毅得像个银鬃铁卫。她似乎早已斩断了所有感情，心中只剩下对胜利的渴望。
t_en: Lynx's eyes burned with the determination of a Silvermane Guard. She seemed to have cut off all emotional ties long ago, leaving only the desire for victory in her heart.

t_ch: 别问了，打牌吧。
t_en: Stop asking questions. Let's play cards.

t_ch: 佩拉，你也是「朗道一家」？
t_en: Pela, you're also a member of the "Landau family"?

t_ch: …你看我像吗？
t_en: ...Do I look like one to you?

t_ch: 玲宝骗我说，要带我去狐图图书店买同人漫画，然后就把我骗到了这里。我刚想逃走，她们说不行，现在杰帕德戍卫官不在，需要我凑齐「朗道一家」的人数。
t_en: Lynxy tricked me. She said she'd take me to Foxfolio Bookstore to buy fan comics, and then lured me here instead. Just as I was about to escape, they said I couldn't leave because Captain Gepard wasn't here, and they needed me to complete the Landaus headcount.

t_ch: ——求求你，快点打败希露瓦，解救可怜的同人女。
t_en: ...Please, hurry up and defeat Serval. Save this poor fangirl.

t_ch: 如今「朗道一家」的团结出现了裂痕。这是好机会，你要利用她们「家族爱」中滋生的嫌隙，一鼓作气，将她们击败！
t_en: The unity of the "Landau Family" is showing cracks. This is your chance: exploit the rifts in their "family love" and strike them down in one fell swoop!

t_ch: 原来这是一场如此黑暗的对决吗！
t_en: What a shadow duel this is!

t_ch: 来吧！让{NICKNAME}见识见识，我们的「家族爱」有多么坚不可摧！
t_en: Come on! Let's show {NICKNAME} just how unbreakable our "family love" really is!

t_ch: 真的，真的是…绕了好远的路啊！
t_en: Really... we really took the long way around!

t_ch: 可惜，{NICKNAME}还是没能使出「玄玄妙手」。
t_en: Too bad {NICKNAME} still couldn't pull off the Hand of Mystique.

t_ch: 可恶…难道我们的「家族爱」…还是不足以战胜{NICKNAME}吗……
t_en: Darn it... Is our "family love" still not enough to defeat {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 姐，不是这样的，我们的「朗道一家的家族爱」还是无敌的。
t_en: Sis, that's not true. Our "Landau Family Love" is still unbeatable.

t_ch: 要怪就只能怪…我哥偏要留守在贝洛伯格，不肯一起过来。
t_en: If there's anyone to blame... it's my brother for insisting on staying in Belobog instead of coming with us.

t_ch: 太好了，我们输了，我们赶紧去狐图图吧…万一打烊了，同人女是真的会哭。
t_en: Great, we lost. Come on, let's hurry to Foxfolio Bookstore... If they close, this fangirl will actually cry.

t_ch: 马上，我姐还剩两句话了。
t_en: Hang on, my sister has only two lines left.

t_ch: 至此，你掌握了我全部的牌技与摇滚精神，我已经没有什么可以教给你了。
t_en: And with that, you've mastered all my card skills and rock 'n' roll spirit. There's nothing left for me to teach you.

t_ch: 去好好教训那个狐假虎威的小屁孩吧！
t_en: Now go teach that little arrogant brat a proper lesson!

t_ch: 谢谢你们，「朗道一家」。
t_en: Thank you, "Landau Family".

t_ch: 不和几位多聊了，我们要赶紧出发去狐图图了。佩拉、玲宝，我们走吧。
t_en: Can't chat with you all any longer, we need to hurry to Foxfolio Bookstore. Pela, Lynxy, let's go.
